title: Epic: Blob support (upload, download, sha256, Blob2)
description:
Why: No blob support exists in the current client. Attachments, avatars, and emoji uploads all require blob upload/download. IMPROVEMENTS.md §10 adds JMAP-BLOBEXT (blob2) with Blob/lookup and Blob/convert (thumbnail generation). The companion spec draft-atwood-jmap-cid-00 defines sha256 verification.

What:
- Blob upload: POST to session.blobUploadUrl, verify sha256 response per JMAP-CID spec
- Blob download: GET blob URL, stream to file or memory, verify sha256
- Blob2 capability detection: urn:ietf:params:jmap:blob2
- Blob/lookup: reverse lookup — given blobId, find all Messages referencing it as attachment
- Blob/convert: server-side image conversion for thumbnail previews
- VAPID key extraction from session capability for push service registration
- Tests: upload round-trip with sha256 verification against known fixture
